sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this title

special_mechanics.name: Contact-based Combat
special_mechanics.description: Combat system where player attacks by drawing sword and crashing into enemies, rather than button-mashing per slash (closer to Ys/Hydlide style on X68000 version)

special_mechanics.name: Experience/Level System
special_mechanics.description: RPG progression through experience gained from battles

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative/empirical data only. No detailed physics documentation available in public sources. Game is action-RPG with real-time combat elements similar to early Ys series. No sub-pixel system, frame-rate physics, or numerical movement parameters documented.
